subscore_notes.visual_similarity: mean over 8 matched pairs of clamp(0.6*ssim + 0.2*edge_overlap + 0.2*(1-rmse_norm),0,1); design(SVG raster) vs stitch-out(PES raster) fidelity, non-circular. Self-test PASSED.
subscore_notes.topology_quality: mean over 8 SVGs of validity*node-per-path-band score
subscore_notes.embroidery_suitability: mean over 72 PES of clamp(safe_len_frac - 1.5*short - 2*long - min(trims_per_1000/50,0.3),0,1); bbox density NOT used

scoring.renormalization_explanation: visual_similarity is AVAILABLE this iteration (real design-vs-stitch-out fidelity), so NO weight is dropped and the FULL weights.json weights are used unchanged (they already sum to 1.00). Weights: visual_similarity=0.40, topology_quality=0.25, embroidery_suitability=0.20, performance=0.10, code_reliability=0.05.
scoring.basis_explanation: DUAL-BASIS reporting. (a) overall_score=0.694753 is the NEW full-weight score including visual_similarity at its real weight 0.40 - this is the honest current score now that all five dimensions are measurable. (b) overall_score_continuity_4metric=0.770046 drops visual and renormalizes over the same 4 metrics as iterations 1-3, so it is directly comparable to iteration 3's 0.5127. Comparing (a) to 0.5127 would be confounded by reintroducing the 0.40 weight; use (b) for a clean iteration-over-iteration delta.

visual_detail.note: mean over 8 matched pairs of clamp(0.6*ssim + 0.2*edge_overlap + 0.2*(1-rmse_norm),0,1); design(SVG raster) vs stitch-out(PES raster) fidelity, non-circular. Self-test PASSED.

self_test.note: identity ssim=1.000000 rmse_norm=0.000000 edge_overlap=1.000000 (expect 1/0/1); blurred ssim=0.962805 (expect <1.0)

comparison_vs_previous.basis_change_note: BASIS CHANGE: iteration 9 reintroduces visual_similarity at weight 0.40, so the primary OVERALL_SCORE (0.694753) is on a NEW full-weight basis and is NOT directly comparable to the previous 4-metric score 0.693855. The apples-to-apples continuity delta (4-metric, visual dropped) is +0.076191; the full-weight 'delta' +0.000898 is confounded by the weight change and is reported only for completeness.
